name: WufooConnector
description: Connects to the Wufoo REST API (v3) — Forms, Entries, Fields, Reports, Users, Webhooks, Comments — using an account API key over HTTP Basic. The base URL is subdomain-specific: https://{subdomain}.wufoo.com/api/v3.

install_fields.label: Wufoo Subdomain
install_fields.help: Your Wufoo subdomain — if your dashboard URL is acme.wufoo.com, enter 'acme'. The connector constructs https://{subdomain}.wufoo.com/api/v3 from this value.

install_fields.label: Wufoo API Key
install_fields.help: From Wufoo → Account → API Information. Sent as the HTTP Basic auth username; the password is the literal placeholder string 'footastic' (any non-empty string is accepted by Wufoo).

install_fields.label: Rate Limit (requests/min)
install_fields.help: Soft cap on Wufoo REST requests per minute. Default 60 matches Wufoo's standard quota.

install_fields.label: Wufoo API Base URL
install_fields.help: Override the default subdomain-derived base URL. Leave blank for production; useful for proxies and integration tests.

apis.name: Install Connector
apis.description: Validates subdomain + api_key and probes /users.json before marking the connector installed.

apis.name: Health Check
apis.description: Verifies Wufoo API connectivity by fetching the list of users.

apis.name: List Users
apis.description: GET /users.json — returns every user the API key can see (used as the health probe).

apis.name: List Forms
apis.description: GET /forms.json — returns summary metadata for every form on the account.

apis.name: Get Form
apis.description: GET /forms/{form_id}.json — returns a single form's metadata by ID or hash.

apis.name: List Fields
apis.description: GET /forms/{form_id}/fields.json — returns the field definitions (id, type, required, sub-fields) for a form.

apis.name: List Entries
apis.description: GET /forms/{form_id}/entries.json — paginated, filterable, sortable entries for a form. Filter list is forwarded as Filter1, Filter2, … with match=AND.

apis.name: Get Entry
apis.description: Resolves a single entry by EntryId via the filtered entries endpoint (Wufoo v3 has no canonical /entries/{id} route).

apis.name: Create Entry
apis.description: POST /forms/{form_id}/entries.json — submits a new entry. field_values must be keyed by Wufoo field IDs (Field1, Field2, …); sent as application/x-www-form-urlencoded.

apis.name: Count Entries
apis.description: GET /forms/{form_id}/entries/count.json — returns the total number of entries for a form.

apis.name: Delete Entry
apis.description: DELETE /forms/{form_id}/entries/{entry_id}.json — removes a single entry from a form.

apis.name: List Comments
apis.description: GET /forms/{form_id}/comments.json — paginated comments attached to a form's entries.

apis.name: Add Comment
apis.description: POST /forms/{form_id}/comments.json — attaches a comment to an entry on a form.

apis.name: List Reports
apis.description: GET /reports.json — returns summary metadata for every report on the account.

apis.name: Get Report
apis.description: GET /reports/{report_id}.json — returns a single report by ID or hash.

apis.name: List Report Widgets
apis.description: GET /reports/{report_id}/widgets.json — returns the widgets that make up a report (charts, tallies, etc.).

apis.name: List Webhooks
apis.description: GET /forms/{form_id}/webhooks.json — returns every webhook registered against a form.

apis.name: Create Webhook
apis.description: PUT /forms/{form_id}/webhooks.json — registers a new webhook URL on a form. Optional handshake_key signs incoming payloads; metadata=true sends the form field schema with each delivery.
